diagrams.title: Nested Dictionary for Multi-Sensor IoT System
diagrams.description: Visual representation of nested dictionary structure for storing sensor data from multiple devices
elements: Level 1: Device ID as primary key (e.g., 'sensor_001')
Level 2: Timestamp as key with nested readings
Level 3: Individual readings: temperature, humidity, pressure
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrate efficient data organization for IoT systems with multiple sensors over time
